name: DirectionProvider

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: Layout direction applied to descendants. Rtl flips logical CSS utilities, native text alignment, form controls and bidi text. Default Ltr.

examples.title: LTR vs RTL
Nested scope override
examples.code:
<DirectionProvider Direction="LayoutDirection.Rtl">
    <Flex Align="center" Gap="3">
        <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Info)" class="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm">Outer panel is RTL.</Lumeo.Text>
    </Flex>

    @* Nested provider overrides just this subtree *@
    <DirectionProvider Direction="LayoutDirection.Ltr">
        <Flex Align="center" Gap="3">
            <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Info)" class="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
            <Lumeo.Text Size="sm">This block is forced back to LTR.</Lumeo.Text>
        </Flex>
    </DirectionProvider>
</DirectionProvider>

examples.title: Wrapping the whole app
examples.code:
@* App.razor / MainLayout — wrap once. *@
<DirectionProvider Direction="@(_isRtl ? LayoutDirection.Rtl : LayoutDirection.Ltr)">
    @Body
</DirectionProvider>

mdSummary:
# DirectionProvider

Direction Provider component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/direction-provider

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DirectionProvider | Direction | `LayoutDirection` | `LayoutDirection.Ltr` | Layout direction applied to descendants. Rtl flips logical CSS utilities, native text alignment, form controls and bidi text. Default Ltr. |
| DirectionProvider | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DirectionProvider | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DirectionProvider | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (DirectionProvider) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<DirectionProvider />
```

## CSS variables
`--radius`

## Files
- `UI/DirectionProvider/DirectionProvider.razor`
